Package grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196

package grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Ech0196BarcodeGenerator
    Generates eCH-0196 v2.2.0 compliant barcodes: PDF417 Structured Append (ISO/IEC 15438) for encoding the full XML content and CODE128C for page identification, as specified in "Beilage 2 zu eCH-0196 V2.2.0 – Barcode Generierung – Technische Wegleitung".
    Ech0196MappingService
    Maps GT dividend report data and ICTax tax data to an eCH-0196 v2.2.0 JAXB model.
    Ech0196PdfGenerator
    Generates a PDF from eCH-0196 XML using Apache FOP, then appends landscape PDF417 barcode pages using PDFBox.
    Ech0196XmlGenerator
    Marshals an Ech0196TaxStatement JAXB object to UTF-8 XML bytes.
